action.reasoning: Observation: early full fine-tuning peaks around the 2-epoch checkpoint (0.1835) and longer/shorter full fine-tuning underperforms, suggesting CLIP features are useful but updating the backbone quickly overfits source Sketch. Analysis: preserving the pretrained CLIP representation while training only the classifier head may reduce target-domain drift; because the head is random, it can be trained for several epochs cheaply with a larger learning rate. Decision: run a frozen-backbone Sketch-only classifier-head experiment for 8 epochs and submit it to test whether less backbone adaptation improves Quickdraw accuracy.
